briefdescription.para: the order is not changed

detaileddescription.para: the order is determined by lexicographical sorting by coordinates (optimal for uniform sampling)

briefdescription.para: the order is determined so to put close in space points in close indices (optimal for compression)
all vertices have same mass=1
vertex mass depends on local geometry and proportional to the area of first-ring triangles
determines the weight or mass of each vertex in applications like Laplacian
all edges have same weight=1
edge weight depends on local geometry and uses cotangent values
determines the weight of each edge in applications like Laplacian
true Laplacian mode when initial mesh shape is remembered and copied in apply

detaileddescription.para: ignore initial mesh shape in the region and just position vertices smoothly in the region

briefdescription.para: the method how to choose between two opposite normal orientations
create mesh using dual marching cubes from OpenVDB library

detaileddescription.para: create mesh using standard marching cubes implemented in MeshLib

briefdescription.para: create mesh using standard marching cubes with additional sharpening implemented in MeshLib
Use one color for whole object.

detaileddescription.para: Use different color (taken from faces colormap) for each primitive

briefdescription.para: Use different color (taken from faces colormap) for each face (primitive for object mesh)
Use different color (taken from faces colormap) for each line (primitive for object lines)
Use different color (taken from verts colormap) for each vertex.

detaileddescription.para:
Type of object coloring,
that texture are applied over main coloring

briefdescription.para: compute edge-only path by building it from start and end simultaneously
compute edge-only path using A*-search algorithm
use Fast Marching algorithm
determines how points to be ordered
determines the weight or mass of each vertex in applications like Laplacian
determines the weight of each edge in applications like Laplacian
typically returned from callbacks to control the behavior of main algorithm
the method how to choose between two opposite normal orientations

detaileddescription.para:
Type of object coloring,
that texture are applied over main coloring

briefdescription.para: the algorithm to compute approximately geodesic path
what way a path can follow in case of several alternatives

detaileddescription.para: returns string representation of enum values Generated from function MR::asString.
